resources.string: To scan and play videos on your device, please allow access to video files.
Video cannot be played, it may have been moved or deleted
No playlists yet, create one in the Playlists tab
Your playlists, themes, preferences and other data are saved as files in the device public storage directory. Clearing cache won\'t lose them. You can view and modify the storage path in Settings.

videoPlayer takes your privacy seriously. This app only reads and processes audio/video files locally. Your playlists, preferences and other data are saved as JSON files in the device public storage directory.
We promise not to modify your original files, nor upload or affect any other private data on your phone. All data files are stored on your device and won\'t be lost when clearing app cache.
This app runs completely offline. All features work without internet, and your data never leaves the device. Data files are only lost when you manually delete them.
Your feedback is very important to us. If you have any feature suggestions or encounter issues, please feel free to contact us.
Please include "videoPlayer" in the email subject for the author to identify.
Hello, I have some suggestions for videoPlayer:
Toggle single repeat or list loop
Long press a playlist card to change its cover image (except "Favorites"). If not set, the first video thumbnail is used; if empty, a soft gradient is shown.
Delete "%1$s"? This action cannot be undone.
Delete the selected %1$d playlists? This action cannot be undone.
Remove the selected %1$d tracks from the playlist?

This application (videoPlayer) is a pure local video playback tool, solely for reading and playing audio/video files stored on the user's device.

This app does not provide any content downloading, uploading, distribution, recommendation or online search services. It does not connect to the internet and has no networking functionality.

All audio/video content played through this app, its source, copyright and legality are the user's sole responsibility. The developer of this app assumes no copyright responsibility for any content played by the user.

User data (including playlists, favorites, playback preferences, theme settings, etc.) is saved as JSON files in the device public storage directory (default path: /sdcard/Documents/VideoPlayerData/). This directory is not automatically deleted when clearing app cache or uninstalling/reinstalling.

The following situations may cause data file loss:

• User manually deletes files in the storage directory
• Device factory reset
• Storage card corruption or formatting
• Deletion by any third-party file management tool

Users are advised to regularly check the storage directory and back up important data.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, the developer of this app shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use this app, including but not limited to data loss, business interruption or device damage.

By downloading, installing or using this app, you acknowledge that you have read, understood and agreed to accept all terms of this statement. If you do not agree with any content of this statement, please immediately stop using this app and uninstall it.

The motivation for making this app is simple — I downloaded many MV video resources, but couldn't enjoy them anytime, anywhere like listening to music.

Every day on the subway, walking, time was boring, and I only had these MVs, but they were "videos", not "music". I wanted to be able to close my eyes, put on headphones, and immerse myself in the melody, just like listening to songs.

And so videoPlayer was born. It plays videos as audio, letting you "listen" to MVs in any scenario, instead of having to "watch" them.

If you're like me, with a large collection of MV resources but can't listen to them as songs, I hope this app can help you.
The motivation for making this app is simple — to solve a problem that had bothered me for a long time.

I downloaded many MV video resources, but couldn\'t enjoy them anytime, anywhere like listening to music. Every day on the subway, walking, time was boring, and I only had these MVs, but they were "videos", not "music".

I wanted to be able to close my eyes, put on headphones, and immerse myself in the melody, just like listening to songs. And so videoPlayer was born. It plays videos as audio, letting you "listen" to MVs in any scenario, instead of having to "watch" them.
"If you\'re like me, with a large collection of MV resources but can\'t listen to them as songs, I hope this app can help you."
This app is completely free, not for any commercial use, only for friends with the same needs.
你从哪里来，要到哪里去
Where do you come from, and where are you going?
"All files access" permission is required to write data files. Tap to authorize.
File access permission granted. Data files can be read and written normally.
Enter a folder path. The app will read and write data files in this directory.
Cannot create this directory. Please check the path.
Your data is processed entirely on device
Press back again to go to home screen
To prevent losing playlists, favorites and other data after uninstalling or clearing cache, this app needs "All files access" permission to save data to the public storage directory.
Tapping "Grant" will open this permission in system settings.
Please read and agree to the Legal Agreement first
